notes: Compressed proxy of a real long agentic mistral-vibe session: 4 tool-eliciting turns. The live 336-event transcript (session_20260706_101952_48e134e3: 10 users, 158 assistant tool_call msgs, 158 tool results, all auto-agreed, 0 rejected) replays as a clean per-turn working→ready arc with 0 flickers. Parser keeps the session WORKING across every intra-turn assistant_message/tool_result boundary and settles to turn_done only on the terminal text-only assistant. vibe is single-birth (session id = the session_<ts>_<hash> dir via SessionIDFromPath), so session_birth anchors UNPINNED to start (a transient proc-<PID> presession cannot steal it) and every turn phase anchors forward so the matcher lands the working transitions on the real session. Observations: agent=mistral-vibe; model=mistral-medium-3.5 (confirmed from the live meta.json config.active_model, passes NormalizeModelName unchanged); tokens_nonzero=true (stats.context_tokens on turn_done); cost_nonzero=false (the adapter never reads session_cost — no per-turn cost is emitted). PROVISIONAL — parser + live-transcript read, no recording yet; record settles the lazy messages.jsonl write timing and tightens the delay bounds. Final state ready.

text: Session appears in ready after launch
Turn 1 ends; working → ready (multiple tool_call/result pairs stay working, no intra-turn flicker)
Final turn ends; working → ready. Session reaches ready and stays there.
